meaning: n.[古生] (灭绝于冰川期的)剑齿虎
examples: This evidence suggested Smilodon lived in groups.
It's very nice to meet you, Kate. He's an overexaggerated smilodon with comical green hair.
Smilodon, is an extinct genus of machairodont felid. It is perhaps one of the most famous prehistoric mammals, and the best known saber-toothed cat.
